items: You can pin Folio notes and files from the right-click menu, and pinned items stay at the top under a small Pinned heading
Folio note cards show your saved custom icon, with the default note icon used when you have not chosen one
Database boards and grouped tables can create notes directly inside a lane or group, with the new note inheriting that status, tag, priority, checkbox, or select value
Database view options now include quick filter and sort preset chips for common project views like overdue, high priority, owner is me, and active project
Priority is now a first-class YAML property with No, Low, Medium, and High values across note properties, database cells, and boards
Database rows can use field defaults, including status, priority, checkbox, and schema-backed property defaults
Board workflows now support adding, renaming, reordering, and coloring lanes for status and multi-select fields
Breadcrumbs now include right-click actions for copying paths, revealing items in the file tree, opening folders, and showing files in Finder
Home has a wider dashboard layout with a date header, week overview, Notes panel, Tasks panel, and quick actions for today's daily note and new tasks
Home buttons now match the sidebar accent style, and note tags sit inline with note titles as clean pills
Folio note rows scan better with tighter spacing, right-aligned icons, fixed thumbnail and tag overflow, and task rings aligned with the action area
The selected Folio note uses a 2px accent rail and a lighter selected tint for a cleaner reading list
Folio remembers your sort choice between sessions
Custom appearance colors now tint Folio note titles and non-markdown file names
Markdown notes use the new default Note icon anywhere the shared file icon wrapper appears
Tag pills across database boards, database tables, note properties, inline editor tags, tasks, and model details now use flatter 4px corners
Status values now use a focused set of nine canonical choices: Backlog, Todo, In progress, In review, Blocked, Waiting, Done, Canceled, and Archived
Existing status values map into the new status set, so older YAML still lands in the closest current status
Kanban cards show status, priority, and tags together in the metadata row with the same colored text treatment
Kanban column headings now use matching icons for status, priority, tags, and custom grouped fields
Configured empty board lanes stay visible, so your workflow structure does not disappear when a column has no cards
Moving a card to a workflow lane now replaces the old status or select value, and manual card order persists inside each lane
Done and Archived lanes carry workflow state and receive distinct board styling
Breadcrumbs use the same folder and file icons, colors, and custom appearance choices that you set in the file tree
Long breadcrumb paths collapse middle items behind an ellipsis, and breadcrumb menu items expose full paths on hover
The editor actions button now opens the shared native popup menu for Info, Local graph, Edit, Preview, and Raw
Close Tab closes the active tab when one exists, and closes the app window when no tabs remain
Daily Notes settings now opens Space settings instead of General settings
Quick create in databases inserts the new row at once and refreshes in the background, avoiding the blocking Loading rows message
Removed beta labels from Folio Mode and Git settings now that both areas have moved into the main settings experience
Removed old beta badge plumbing and unused badge styles from settings
Removed the custom animated editor actions panel in favor of the shared native popup menu
Added a reusable native menu helper for Tauri popup menus
Added a Tauri command that opens the native Space menu from the sidebar space button
File tree, Folio, and database board right-click menus now use native macOS/Tauri popup menus
Icon and color appearance actions now live in native submenus
Database folder selection now uses the native macOS folder picker
Settings and database pickers now use native select controls
Home now opens as a centered weekly panel with notes, tasks, stable sizing, and native-style controls
Database board cards, lane buttons, handles, and color swatches now use calmer hover states
The main app window now has a 680 x 460 minimum size
Escape and Command + [ now close Settings and return to the main app view
The editor actions dropdown now opens and closes faster
The active editor title rename input no longer shows the shared focus underline
Fixed Pi provider launches when Tauri starts the CLI without the Node install directory in the child environment
Open Calendar now lives under Open Home, and Close AI Panel now lives under Toggle AI Panel
Removed the main-window AI Agent tab, command path, component, helper, manifest entry, and tab-only CSS while keeping the right-side AI panel intact
Removed old Radix context-menu wrappers, stale context-menu CSS, unused test mocks, and the FileTreeAppearanceMenu component
Removed unused shadcn primitive exports from dialog, dropdown-menu, popover, scroll-area, and table
Removed unused source exports, internal-only public types, dead declarations, unused icon wrappers, and the stale release-notes type stub
Removed unused dependencies: @hookform/resolvers, @tiptap/extension-underline, cmdk, react-day-picker, react-hook-form, react-resizable-panels, and zod
Removed the old month-picker code, unused calendar components, stale calendar CSS, and SettingsSegmented styles
Removed Reload and Save from the Markdown editor actions menu
Added Pi as an agent provider
Added Claude as an agent provider through `claude -p`, following Anthropic's terms of service
Added Show in Finder to note context menus in the file tree and Folio
Added an embedded Mermaid canvas with pan, fit, and Cmd-wheel zoom
Quick Note can append to any note in the current space from a folder-grouped picker
Active TOC dashes now use the accent color, and the collapsed TOC shows only the dashes
The file tree Notes header now includes expand-all and collapse-all controls
Mermaid now renders sanitized SVG through beautiful-mermaid and switches between source and preview when you click the block
The sidebar now collapses below 760px and gives the main area the freed space
The expand-sidebar button now disables while the window is too narrow to reopen the sidebar
The floating TOC now follows the active heading while you scroll
Delete and Backspace now open the confirmation flow for focused files, folders, and selected Folio notes without affecting text inputs or rename fields
The file tree now highlights the open file without also highlighting its parent folder
Removed the Mermaid Play/Stop overlay and bundled mermaid package
Fixed OpenCode event streams closing before completion
You can now rename files by clicking the title in the editor
Database relation and multi-select pills now use the app accent color instead of per-value colors
Sidebar, Folio, database, and view rename fields now edit like plain text instead of boxed inputs
YAML and frontmatter editing now feels like part of the editor
About settings now has cleaner copy and less unused code
Restored and simplified the global app scrollbar styles
Fixed Folio note renaming
Folio search and sort controls now respect the collapsed-sidebar space
Editor tab bar controls now start to the right of the floating sidebar button
Removed the animation when switching between the command palette and search
Removed the folder name and note count from the top of Folio mode
Removed the note count from the sidebar All Notes item, including fetching, storage, announcements, rendering, and styling
Removed the duplicate Support and Diagnostics section from About settings
The editor feels cleaner and faster, with quicker slash commands and AI responses
Tags now use your theme accent color for a more consistent workspace
The sidebar has a cleaner layout with less visual noise
Glyph now opens file previews in the default macOS app
Table tag and value suggestions now stay above neighboring cells while you edit them
Right sidebar resizing now tracks the pointer more cleanly
Removed automatic updates and the related General settings text
Removed the task progress setting. Task progress indicators stay on
Removed the database note count setting and the note total from database headers
Removed HTML export, note printing, Zen Mode, and markdown saving from the web view
Removed Git sync status from the sidebar footer
Removed the delightful Glyph setting and related code
Trimmed the built-in theme list
